---
title: "Why this site exists"
date: 2026-04-18
description: "A short note on what this is for."
categories: [notes]
---

<div class="post-meta">April 2026</div>

This site is for writing.

Most things here will be short — experiments, notes, small observations. Some will be longer.

The format is intentionally spare. The writing should do the work.
